auth.forgotPasswordSuccess: If the email exists, a reset link will be sent to it.
auth.noAdminAccess: The current user does not have admin console access
auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Password reset. Sign in with your new password.
auth.activateWorkspaceDescription: Create the Owner membership and activate the workspace. Existing account credentials and profile data are preserved.
auth.activationPasswordPlaceholder: At least 8 characters for a new account; leave blank if existing
auth.activationPasswordHint: If this email already has an account, leave this blank and sign in with the existing password.
auth.signUpUnavailableDescription: Self-service registration is not open yet. Use an invitation link or contact the platform operator.
auth.subtitle: Sign in to your workspace

auth.workspaceDescription: Enter your workspace name to continue
auth.workspaceApplicationDescription: Apply for a workspace workspace, verify your email, and wait for platform approval.

platformAuth.title: Platform control plane
platformAuth.wrongPrincipal: This is not a platform account

workspaceApplication.availabilityChecking: Checking whether workspace applications are open.
workspaceApplication.availabilityFailed: We could not check application availability. Please try again later.
workspaceApplication.unavailableDescription: The platform is not accepting new workspace applications. Contact the platform operator.
workspaceApplication.title: Apply for a workspace
workspaceApplication.description: Share the workspace and owner details. After email verification, the platform team will review and provision the workspace.
workspaceApplication.submittedDescription: Once the owner email is verified, the application will enter platform review.
workspaceApplication.checkEmail: Check the inbox and follow the verification link.
workspaceApplication.verificationDescription: Verifying the owner email for this application.
workspaceApplication.verifiedDescription: The application is ready for review. The owner will receive an activation email after approval.
workspaceApplication.cancellationDescription: Once cancelled, the platform team will no longer review or provision this workspace.
workspaceApplication.cancelledDescription: This workspace application has been cancelled and needs no further action.

platform.workspaceGovernanceDescription: Approve new workspaces, browse the workspace directory, and manage workspace availability.
platform.workspaceApplicationsDescription: Review applications and create the workspace, default workspace, and owner account.
platform.approved: Workspace created. The owner activation email is pending.
